LanguageData.GD.FireflyNoEnergy: The Firefly is out of energy.
LanguageData.BlackMechanoidSleeping: Due to the solar flare, the black mechanoids are sleeping.
LanguageData.CalledBlackMechanoid: {0} disguised as a wounded centipede sent a distress signal, which was accepted.
LanguageData.GD.AttackModeDesc: When turned on, this {0} will automatically release mechanoids attack until the resources are exhausted.
LanguageData.BlackPassedDesc: There are two black-clad mechanoids who happen to be passing through the area. If you are not ready, be careful not to provoke them.
LanguageData.GD.ChangeWeaponDesc: Switching the weapon held by the Mechanoid.
LanguageData.ReceiverSelectDesc: Modify the size of the target cluster detected by the shortwave receiver.
LanguageData.ArchoMineTriggered: An Archotech Trick Mine has been triggered!
LanguageData.MarrowADestroy: The psychic shielding marrow has been destroyed.
LanguageData.MarrowBDestroy: The psychic suppression marrow has been destroyed.
LanguageData.MarrowCDestroy: The psychic berserk marrow has been destroyed.
LanguageData.GD.TermiteToggleDesc: Choose between thump bombs and smoke bombs.
LanguageData.GD.ToggleFamineDesc: Interferes with the enemy's nerve conduction, suppressing all enemies' consciousness and movement ability to less than 35%.
LanguageData.GD.ToggleFamineDescB: Heal your own fresh wounds at a faster rate.
LanguageData.ReinforcedTipDesc: When the affluent colony is on the right track, the mechanoids will also see this place as a threat they have to eradicate. \n\nSince the total wealth value accumulated has reached as much as one million, the Mechanoid Hive has armed all the combat units under its command with advanced accessory parts, ready to meet a whole new challenge.
LanguageData.GD.HitArmorBarTip: The number of remaining reactive armor counts on the mechanoid is shown here. The mechanoid has a reactive armor trigger limit of {0}, and currently has {1} remaining. The number of times can be recovered by mechanitor repair.
LanguageData.GD.MustReserchBench: must be placed on a hi-tech research bench.
LanguageData.GD.MustSameRot: must be oriented in the same direction as the hi-tech research bench.
LanguageData.GD.MustPlaceEdge: must be placed at the very edge of the hi-tech research bench.
